prose: Fukui reactivity indices were computed for aniline (14 atoms) using DFT at the tier 'standard' level — B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF, density-fit RI) — in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The N±1 states used charge +1/mult 2 (cation) and charge −1/mult 2 (anion). Partial charges were obtained via the Mulliken scheme (PySCF). The headline value reported is the maximum f⁺ index (most electrophilic site), found at C3 (atom 3, ortho ring carbon): f⁺ = 2.2975867. The most nucleophilic site is N1 (amino nitrogen) with f⁻ = 0.20452359.
